prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为1536→2156→2941→3432→2505名，整体呈先降后升走势。2021至2024年逐年后移，累计后移约1896名；2025年大幅回升至2505名，较2024年前移约927名，显示报考热度明显回升。2025年基准位次约2505名；物理类招生计划2021年131人、2022年137人、2023年134人、2024年128人、2025年128人；2026年计划125人，较2025年减少3人，小幅缩招约2.3%，竞争略有加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 同济大学为985、211、双一流高校，软科中国大学排名2026年第18名，稳居全国Top20，办学层次顶尖；2022年因河南断档事件声誉明显负面，2023年土木工程专业暴跌持续偏负面，2025年投档线暴跌至604分再次偏负面；2026年声誉仍偏负面（学术不端事件）。抖音热度总排名第26位（较热），短视频曝光量较高，报考关注度不低。历史投档异常信号在2022年（高关注）和2025年（低关注）均有记录，对考生心理有滞后影响；土木工程A+、城乡规划学A+、环境科学与工程A+、管理科学与工程A+、建筑学A、计算机科学与技术A等17个A-及以上学科，学科实力雄厚，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业社会热度持续偏高，与同济大学优势工科方向高度契合；土木建筑类专业社会热度明显降温，可能影响相关专业报考。河北省2026年普通高考总人数约60.98万，较2025年总人数（约60.68万）略有增加；物理类考生估算约36.5万人，较2025年（36.3万）小幅增长，竞争压力略增。；同济大学位于上海，对河北考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在河北省招生占比约2.3%–3.0%（2021–2025年），招生规模稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅回升的强势走势、2026年小幅缩招（125人 vs 128人）、河北省考生总数微增、学校声誉偏负面但抖音热度较高等因素，预计2026年物理类竞争较2025年基本持平略升。预测最低位次约2500名，区间2200–2800名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间2200–2800名内，建议以二档专业为主攻方向、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次明显优于区间下限（2200名以内）可重点冲击国豪精英班、人工智能拔尖班等一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（2800名左右）建议优先考虑三档专业以确保录取。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the Physics Category were 1536 → 2156 → 2941 → 3432 → 2505, showing an overall trend of first decreasing and then increasing. From 2021 to 2024, rankings moved backward year by year, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1896 places; in 2025, rankings rebounded significantly to 2505, moving forward by about 927 places compared to 2024, indicating a notable recovery in application popularity. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 2505; enrollment plans for the Physics Category were 131 in 2021, 137 in 2022, 134 in 2023, 128 in 2024, and 128 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 125, a decrease of 3 from 2025, a slight reduction of about 2.3%, leading to slightly intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tongji University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, ranking 18th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, firmly in the national Top 20, with a top-tier educational level; in 2022, its reputation was notably negative due to the Henan cutoff incident, in 2023 the civil engineering major plummeted, continuing a negative trend, and in 2025 the admission cutoff dropped sharply to 604 points, again negative; in 2026, the reputation remains somewhat negative (due to academic misconduct incidents). On Douyin, its overall popularity ranks 26th (relatively hot), with high short video exposure, indicating considerable application attention. Historical abnormal admission signals were recorded in 2022 (high attention) and 2025 (low attention), having a lagging psychological impact on candidates; with A+ disciplines in Civil Engineering, Urban and Rural Planning, Environmental Science and Engineering, Management Science and Engineering, and A-level disciplines in Architecture, Computer Science and Technology, among 17 disciplines rated A- or above, the university has strong academic strength, exerting strong appeal for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity, closely aligning with Tongji University's advantageous engineering directions; civil engineering and architecture majors have seen a clear decline in social popularity, potentially affecting applications to related majors. In 2026, the total number of Hebei Province general college entrance examination candidates is approximately 609,800, a slight increase from 2025 (about 606,800); the estimated number of Physics Category candidates is about 365,000, a small increase from 2025 (363,000), leading to slightly increased competitive pressure. Tongji University is located in Shanghai, exerting strong regional appeal to Hebei candidates; its enrollment proportion in Hebei Province is about 2.3%–3.0% (2021–2025), with stable enrollment scale.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong rebound in rankings in 2025, the slight enrollment reduction in 2026 (125 vs. 128), the slight increase in total Hebei candidates, the somewhat negative school reputation but high Douyin popularity, it is expected that competition in the Physics Category in 2026 will be roughly flat to slightly higher than in 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 2500, with a range of 2200–2800.

- Engineering Experimental Class (Excellence Plan Class).

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

- Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 2200–2800, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (within 2200), prioritize aiming for top-tier majors like the Guohao Elite Class and Artificial Intelligence Top-notch Class; if the ranking is near the upper bound of the range (around 2800), it is advisable to prioritize Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.

prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次逐年后移趋势、2026年招生计划持平、考生总数稳定、学校声誉偏负面等因素，预计2026年历史类竞争较2025年基本持平略升。预测最低位次约527名，区间463–591名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2023 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were 355 → 496 → 512, showing a gradual downward trend over the years, with a cumulative shift of about 157 places in the past 3 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 512; the enrollment plan for History Category was 3 in 2023, 8 in 2024, and 8 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 8, unchanged from 2025, with a stable enrollment scale.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Tongji University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, ranking 18th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, firmly in the national Top 20, with a top-tier academic level; in 2022, due to the Henan enrollment gap incident, its reputation was significantly negative; in 2025, the admission score plummeted to 604 points, which is somewhat negative; in 2026, the reputation remains somewhat negative (due to academic misconduct incidents). Douyin popularity ranks 26th overall (relatively popular), with very few History Category enrollments (only 8), making ranking fluctuations highly influenced by individual high-scoring candidates; Foreign Language and Literature A-, Marxist Theory A-, and other humanities and social science disciplines have relatively high ratings, closely related to History Category enrollment majors (Law, Humanities Experimental Class).

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The Law major has high social popularity (recommended), and the Chinese Language/Literature major is also relatively popular (recommended), matching the enrollment direction of Tongji University's History Category. The estimated number of History Category candidates in Hebei Province in 2026 is about 244,000 (estimated based on the recent proportion of about 40%), basically unchanged from 2025 (243,700).

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the gradual downward trend in historical rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the stable total number of candidates, and the somewhat negative reputation of the university, it is expected that competition in the History Category in 2026 will be basically the same as in 2025, with a slight increase. The predicted minimum ranking is about 527, with a range of 463–591.
